title: Ability to limit items viewable to a MIRROR People column (from subitems)
excerpt:
Add the ability to set permissions based on a mirrored people column (mirrored from subitems). There is also no option for setting permissions based on People columns in subitems. 
I saw this topic from a few years ago, …

posts.author: mgravlin (Mica Gravlin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Add the ability to set permissions based on a mirrored people column (mirrored from subitems). There is also no option for setting permissions based on People columns in subitems.

I saw this topic from a few years ago, but it references workaround apps that I don’t think exist anymore and this should be supported natively.
